baseline_rows.thesis: Cyclical machinery quality with strong trend and operating leverage.
Search/cloud AI monetization with positive earnings evidence.
Aerospace quality and strong earnings surprise history.
GLP-1/obesity leadership with resilient relative strength.
Copper beta and cyclical leverage in a pro-risk tape.
Rate/credit-sensitive financial rebound with low realized sigma.
Large-bank quality with balanced credit and capital-markets exposure.
Energy major quality but negative market beta in the sampled window.
Data-center REIT demand with rate sensitivity.
Electrification exposure with high beta and cyclical sensitivity.
AI networking/custom silicon strength balanced by high beta.

lineage.sortino_downside_window: negative daily returns in trailing 30 trading days; minimum 3 negative observations; scaled by sqrt(21)
